commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Comprehending this, as He who taught wished, and receiving it in its grand sense, he teaches worthily "on the housetops"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: House-tops. Our divine Saviour speaks here according to the custom of his own nation, where it was not uncommon for men to preach from the house-top, when they wished to deliver any thing to the public; for their houses had flat roofs. (Ven. Bede)
